metadata.title: BimDossier
metadata.defaultTitle: BimDossier — Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb)-compliant digital dossier
metadata.description: Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb)-compliant digital dossier for Dutch contractors. Track deadlines, manage documents, resolve findings, and file on time.

hero.headline: Never miss a Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) deadline again.
hero.subtitle: BimDossier is the digital dossier platform for Dutch contractors. Track bouwmelding and gereedmelding deadlines, manage your documents, resolve findings, and file your dossier bevoegd gezag on time.

features.headline: Everything a contractor needs for Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) compliance
features.subtitle: From project kickoff to gereedmelding — one platform for your entire Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) dossier.

deadlines.title: Deadline tracking
deadlines.body: Automatic computation of bouwmelding, informatieplicht, and gereedmelding deadlines. Email reminders at T-30, T-14, T-7, and T-1 days so you never miss a filing.

dossier.title: Dossier completeness
dossier.body: Template-based checklist per building type showing exactly which documents are still needed for your gereedmelding. Progress bar updates as you upload.

findings.title: Finding management
findings.body: Log inspection findings from your kwaliteitsborger, assign resolution, and upload evidence photos. Track every finding from open to verified.

certificates.title: Certificate library
certificates.body: Upload typed certificates — CE/DoP declarations, test reports, warranties — with expiry tracking. Get automatic warnings before certificates expire.

viewer.title: 3D + 2D model viewer
viewer.body: View federated IFC models in the browser — no desktop software. Cut sections, measure, switch storeys and floor plans, and click any element for its properties.

reports.title: Compliance reports
reports.body: Generate audit-ready PDF reports: borgingsplan, verklaring kwaliteitsborger, and the complete dossier bevoegd gezag package.

snagging.title: Snag on drawings & in 3D
snagging.body: Pin findings directly onto your PDF floor plans or 3D model. Every snag carries its location, photos, and Bbl reference.

board.title: Findings board & calendar
board.body: Track every finding on a Kanban board, a deadline calendar, and overview dashboards — filter by assignee, status, or severity.

photos.title: Photo evidence & annotation
photos.body: Capture photos on site, mark them up with arrows and notes, and attach them to findings as proof of resolution.

mobile.title: Mobile inspections, even offline
mobile.body: A native app for on-site snagging. Place findings, shoot photos, and keep working with no signal — it syncs when you're back online.

bcf.title: Open BCF interoperability
bcf.body: Import and export findings as BCF to round-trip issues with Solibri, BIMcollab, Revit, and your kwaliteitsborger's tools.

collaboration.title: Team roles & audit trail
collaboration.body: Invite your team with the right permissions (owner, editor, viewer, inspector). Every change is logged for an audit-ready history.

roadmap.headline: What we're building next
roadmap.subtitle: Already in design or in progress — not available yet.

comments.title: Finding discussions
comments.body: Comment threads on each finding so your team and kwaliteitsborger can resolve issues in context.

handover.title: Consumentendossier & oplevering
handover.body: Client handover sign-off and proces-verbaal, separate from the dossier bevoegd gezag.

ai.title: AI dossier assistant
ai.body: Ask questions across your documents and drawings. Self-hosted and privacy-first — your data never leaves our EU infrastructure.

push.title: Mobile push reminders
push.body: Deadline and finding alerts pushed straight to your phone.

howItWorks.headline: From project start to gereedmelding in four steps

step1.title: Create your project
step1.body: Enter the address with Dutch autocomplete, select building type and gevolgklasse, set planned dates. Deadlines are computed automatically.

step2.title: Upload documents
step2.body: Drawings, certificates, KB documents — upload everything in one place. The dossier checklist shows what is still missing.

step3.title: Track findings
step3.body: Log inspection findings, assign resolution to your team, upload evidence photos. Full lifecycle from open to verified.

step4.title: File on time
step4.body: Email reminders before every deadline. Download the complete dossier package for gereedmelding filing at the Omgevingsloket.

cta.headline: Stop chasing documents. Start filing on time.
cta.subtitle: Join the early access program. Get your Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) dossier under control before your next deadline.

blog.headline: Insights & updates
blog.subtitle: Quality Assurance in Construction Act (Wkb) compliance, Dutch building regulations, and product updates.
blog.empty: No posts yet. Check back soon.

contactPage.headline: Let's find the right plan for your team
contactPage.subtitle: We'll walk you through BimDossier, answer your questions, and help you choose the plan that fits your projects.
contactPage.bookCallDescription: Schedule a 30-minute demo with our team. We'll show you the platform and discuss pricing tailored to your situation.
contactPage.emailDescription: Prefer email? Reach out and we'll get back to you within one business day.
contactPage.noBookingUrl: Booking link coming soon — please reach out via email in the meantime.

intro.subtitle: We're opening a limited pilot to a small group of Dutch contractors. Tell us about your team — if it's a fit, we'll be in touch.

errors.pendingDuplicate: We've already received your request. Give us a day to review — we'll email you.
errors.alreadyApproved: Your BimDossier account is already set up. Check your email for the activation link, or contact support if you didn't receive one.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests from your network — please try again in an hour.
errors.unreachable: We couldn't reach the BimDossier API. Please try again in a moment.

snagShowcase.headline: Catch defects before they cost you.
snagShowcase.subtitle: Drag to rotate the model. Click a pin to see the snag it flags.
snagShowcase.hintClick: Click a pin to see the snag
snagShowcase.learnMoreBlog: Learn how Wkb borging works on the blog
snagShowcase.fallbackBody: Your browser cannot show the live 3D model, but here are the snags it carries:
snagShowcase.fallbackAlt: Interactive 3D building model with quality-assurance snags
